ValidationRule.description: Blocks editing of a Warranty when it is not active. New records and records whose Active flag is being set back to true are allowed; existing inactive warranties become read-only regardless of profile.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOT( Active__c ), OR( ISCHANGED( Product__c ), ISCHANGED( Start_Date__c ), ISCHANGED( Warranty_Period_Months__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This warranty is inactive or expired and cannot be edited. Only active warranties can be modified.
